name: Spicy Pork Stir-Fry Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork across grain into thin, narrow strips.
2. Combine the pork, 1 tablespoon teriyaki sauce, and crushed red pepper; set aside.
3. Mix cornstarch, remaining 2 tablespoons teriyaki sauce, and crushed red pepper; set aside.
4. In a separate bowl, mix cornstarch, remaining 2 tablespoons teriyaki sauce, vinegar, and 1 cup water; set aside.
5. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a hot wok or large skillet over high heat.
6. Add the pork and stir-fry for 2 minutes; remove from heat and set aside.
7. Add onion to the pan and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
8. Add radishes and zucchini, and stir-fry for an additional minute.
9. Return the pork and teriyaki sauce mixture to the pan.
10. Cook, stirring, until the sauce boils and thickens.
11. Spoon over a bed of lettuce on a serving platter; serve immediately.
